description_long: This is a pair of combination pliers featuring robust, insulated handles in a bright red color, designed for comfortable and secure grip. The handles are ergonomically contoured with visible ribbing and a slight bulge for improved hand control. The jaws are made of blackened steel and display multiple functional zones, including a flat gripping area, a serrated section for enhanced hold, and integrated wire cutting and stripping notches. Yellow printed measurement markings and wire gauge indicators are visible on the metal body, suggesting multi-purpose use for electrical and mechanical tasks. The pivot joint is a fixed, single-axis type, ensuring reliable leverage and force transmission. The overall construction appears durable, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban maintenance settings.
description: A sturdy pair of red-handled combination pliers with ergonomic grips, blackened steel jaws, and multi-functional cutting and stripping features. Markings and notches on the jaws indicate its use for electrical and mechanical tasks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the pliers, highlighting the red ergonomic handles and the black steel jaws with yellow markings.
description_view_1: Front view focusing on the open ends of the handles and the detailed markings and notches on the jaw surfaces.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other profile of the pliers, with clear visibility of the handle contours and jaw geometry.
description_view_3: Rear view emphasizing the rounded, ribbed ends of the handles and the alignment of the handles and jaws.
attribute_handle_type: Ergonomic, straight handles with red insulated plastic and ribbed grip sections.
attribute_jaw_design: Combination jaws with flat and serrated gripping surfaces, integrated wire cutter and multiple notches for wire stripping.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Fixed single-axis pivot, non-adjustable, standard for combination pliers.
attribute_grip_pattern: Ribbed and contoured plastic with visible grooves for enhanced grip.
